Body.Content:
The Simulation Grader helps admins understand and improve auto‑labeling accuracy before enforcing a policy. When enabled during simulation, matched items are evaluated by an AI-powered grader to determine whether each match is a true positive or false positive, along with an explanation of why the content matched. The results roll up into clear policy‑level accuracy insights and file‑level evaluation details, giving admins confidence to refine conditions, upgrade to smarter classifiers, and move policies to enforcement with greater trust.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: May CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Purview: Information Protection – Auto-labeling Simulation Evaluation

Body.Content:
This feature will be cancelled: Microsoft has decided not to move forward with the Auto-labeling Simulation Evaluation feature as previously planned. Following a product strategy review, the feature is no longer scheduled for Public Preview or General Availability, and development efforts have shifted to other classification and labeling investments. We apologize for any inconvenience.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: May CY2026
